visible_evidence: The candidate preserves the intended four-panel evidence-chain composition and the main stage labels are readable.
The VLM target label is visibly wrong: it reads Target: boy instead of the required Target: box.
Because Figure 1 is a roadmap, wrong in-image text would mislead the reader even though the rest of the composition is close to v16.
decision: Do not replace Figure 1. Keep v16 as the active main-paper schematic.

claim_boundary.may_support: image-generation iteration audit for the schematic roadmap
